title: Card Variable
description: A user-configurable variable that allows card creators to expose customization options to users.

key.title: Key
key.description: Unique machine-readable identifier for this variable, used in variable references.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable display name for this variable.

description.title: Description
description.description: Explanation of what this variable controls.

type.title: Type
type.description: The input type for this variable.

default.title: Default Value
default.description: The default value for this variable.

value.title: Value
value.description: The machine-readable value for this option.

label.title: Label
label.description: The human-readable label displayed for this option.
